title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Khan Academy India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Khan Academy India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Khan Academy India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Curriculum Developer at our Nagpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Khan Academy India:
Khan Academy India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Khan Academy India!
